name: Qwen-72B
license: Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT (custom, free commercial use below usage threshold)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer, 80 layers (RoPE, SwiGLU, RMSNorm)
note: Gen-1 flagship trained on 3T tokens with 32K context; beat Llama2-70B and topped GPT-3.5 on MMLU/C-Eval/GSM8K at release.
tpsNote: Q4 weights (~48GB) exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM; requires multi-GPU or CPU/disk offload.
